content_text: {"task_id":"task-001","attempted_changes":["{\"diff_text\":\"diff --git a/tests/test_health.py b/tests/test_health.py\\n--- a/tests/test_health.py\\n+++ b/tests/test_health.py\\n@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ def test_health_returns_ok() -> None:\\n     client = TestClient(app)\\n     response = client.get(\\\"/health\\\")\\n+    assert response.headers[\\\"content-type\\\"].startswith(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n     assert response.status_code == 200\\n     payload = response.json()\\n     assert payload == {\\\"status\\\": \\\"ok\\\"}\\n\",\"task_id\":\"task-001\",\"kind\":\"test_patch\",\"target_paths\":[\"tests/test_health.py\"]}"]}
